ticket_name: ON HOLD - Meter Re Routing - DO # 9783
description: Anthony, Good morning. Development has completed the work on the rerouting. Here are some items that came out of the development and what we will need to look at when doing in test. File given only has CR not CR+LF at end of lines so compensated. If they change will affect the processing. After looking at the file I used columns 1, 3 and 4 for account number, book, and sequence. I did not use the location in the file as that rarely gives great matching. The account numbers in the file have had their leading zeroes stripped, so I had to do a numerical equivalence to match customer records (ie convert 000031 in DB to a literal 31 before comparing to file). This probably will not be a problem unless they have varying account number lengths and have accounts that have the same value with different leading zeroes (ex 00031 and 00031 are two different account in our system but numerically it is the same so a single value in the file may match more than one customer in system). MANY of the records in the file are for customers who are not at a location in the DB we have here. I am not sure how old the data is here, so we will use your database copy live to test and then test out this process with up to date data. I return a list of accounts not found, a list of accounts that do not have a service location, and a list of accounts with service locations without the group. After it updates the book/seq on the account, it checks the books affected and if any duplicates, will resequence them. We are ready to deliver this in test. Do you have new file to try out? If not you will need to let us know when you have a file and we can schedule to copy live to test and run on the test environment. Please let us know at your earliest convenience.
